events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: window pan flashing absent. This is a flashing & WRB integration issue on a commercial project. IRC R703 requires flashing around windows/doors to prevent water intrusion. Pan flashing at window sill is critical for water management. Absent pan flashing is non-compliant. Work is rough-complete. Decision: fail. Risk: high (water intrusion potential). Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective.
